title: Resolution Extending Deep Sympathy and Condolences to the Family, Relatives and Friends of Former Municipal Councilor Jay G. Rolusta Whose Father, Mr. Pablo Gonzales Rolusta, Passed Away Last April 27, 2020. (AUTHOR(S) Councilor(s) Josephine S. Evangelista, Janos S. Lapiz, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A.
